title: Required field is not blank
description: Non-nullable parameters must contain a value.

title: Required field is not a placeholder
description: Non-nullable parameters must not be 'Not Found', 'N/A', 'Unknown', etc.

title: Atomic field has no delimiter
description: Atomic parameters must be a single value with no ';' delimiter.

title: Atomic field length is sane
description: Atomic values should not be paragraph-length (<= 2000 chars).

title: Composite meets minimum element count
description: Composite parameters must contain at least 'min' elements.

title: Composite respects maximum element count
description: Composite parameters must contain at most 'max' elements.
example_fail: A; B; C; D; E; F; G; H; I; J; K

title: Composite has no empty elements
description: No empty values between delimiters (e.g. 'A;; B').

title: Composite has no trailing delimiter
description: Composite values should not end with a stray ';'.

title: Composite element length is sane
description: Each composite element should be concise (<= 300 chars).

title: Value is single-line (no newlines)
description: Cells must be single-line so they paste cleanly into Excel/CSV.

title: Value has no bullet/numbered markers
description: No '- ', '* ', bullet, or '1. ' list markers inside a cell.

title: Value has no leading/trailing whitespace
description: Values must be trimmed.

title: Value has no double spaces
description: No accidental double spacing.

title: Value has alphanumeric content
description: A value cannot be only punctuation/symbols.

title: Value length is within hard cap
description: No single cell may exceed 8000 characters.

title: URL fields are well-formed
description: URL parameters must start with http:// or https:// and contain no spaces.

title: Email fields are well-formed
description: Email parameters must look like name@domain.tld.

title: Phone fields look like phone numbers
description: Phone parameters must contain at least 7 digits.

title: Numeric fields contain a number
description: Numeric parameters must contain at least one digit.

title: Ratings are within 0-10
description: Rating parameters must be a number between 0 and 10.

title: Enum value is in the allowed set
description: When a parameter defines allowed_values, the value must be one of them.
